title: Pan-Seared Irish Lamb Chops
description: Moist and flavorful lamb chops seared to perfection in an Irish skillet, served with a hint of intensity from the spices.

ingredients.name: flavored olive oil
ingredients.notes: such as truffle or garlic oil

instructions: Preheat the skillet over medium-high heat (400°F/200°C).
Pat the lamb chops dry with a paper towel.
Season the lamb chops with salt, pepper, and thyme.
Add the flavored olive oil to the preheated skillet.
Sear the lamb chops for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the oven (400°F/200°C).
Cook the lamb chops for 5-7 minutes, or until they reach an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let the lamb chops rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb chops with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of thyme.
